Subtype_A_Proliferative (n=187): Subtype B enriched for hormone-secreting tumors (86.5% vs. 58.7% for A+C, P<0.001)
Subtype B vs A: P<0.001, Subtype B vs C: P<0.001, Subtype A vs C: P=0.90

Subtype B (secretory) shows strong association with hormone-secreting tumors, particularly prolactinomas and somatotropinomas. Subtype C (invasive) has similar hormone distribution to Subtype A but with higher proportion of prolactinomas.
